nasb.text: And it shall serve as a sign to you on your hand, and as a reminder on your forehead, that the law of the Lord may be in your mouth; for with a powerful hand the Lord brought you out of Egypt.

esv.text: And it shall be to you as a sign on your hand and as a memorial between your eyes, that the law of the Lord may be in your mouth. For with a strong hand the Lord has brought you out of Egypt.

cnv.text: 這要在你的手上作記號，在你額上作記念，好使耶和華的律法常在你的口中，因為耶和華曾用大能的手把你從埃及領出來。

ccb.text: 这节期就好像在你们手上或额上作的记号，叫你们记得耶和华的律法，祂曾经用大能的手把你们带出埃及。
